market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
articles.description: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

articles.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
articles.description: According to Bloomberg, OpenAI has enlisted an outside law firm to work through its options.

articles.title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
articles.description: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.

articles.title: Crypto losses from North Korea hackers in 2025 rose 51% YoY: Report
articles.description: The cybersecurity threats from North Korea are perpetrated by a myriad of small hacker groups deploying malware and executing social engineering scams.

articles.title: US Senate Banking Committee votes to advance CLARITY Act
articles.description: Lawmakers debated amendments on ethics and other issues for a digital asset market structure bill before advancing the legislation, setting up a Senate floor vote.

articles.title: Bitcoin hits $82,000, Coinbase leads crypto stock gains as Clarity Act advances
articles.description: The upbeat public debut of AI chipmaker Cerebras is also helping to lift both crypto and traditional markets.

articles.title: Cerebras shares skyrocket 100% after $5.5 billion IPO amid AI stock frenzy
articles.description: The AI infrastructure company began trading Thursday as investors continue pouring capital into artificial intelligence stocks.

articles.title: Clarity Act clears U.S. Senate committee, on its way to a final test in Congress
articles.description: After a bipartisan approval in the Senate Banking Committee, the crypto market structure bill now advances to a final overhaul aimed at Senate and House passage.

articles.title: XRP whale wallets hit all-time highs: Will it push price above $1.50?
articles.description: XRP whales are accumulating at record levels, increasing the chances of XRP price rise toward $2, fueled by growing XRPL activity and a bullish technical setup.

articles.title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
articles.description: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

articles.title: CME dives further into $85 trillion digital assets market with Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures
articles.description: A CME group executive said the demand grew with average daily trading volume in his firms’ suite increasing by 43% year-to date.

articles.title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
articles.description: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.

articles.title: U.S. senators lament failure to win bipartisan support, yet, on crypto Clarity Act
articles.description: In the hearing to advance the market structure bill to its next stage, lawmakers from both parties granted lengthy talks hadn't yet found needed common ground.

articles.title: Bitcoin holds key support for $85K breakout as S&P 500 hits new all-time high
articles.description: Bitcoin entered recovery mode after inflation-induced losses, while US stocks shook off macro data with broader risk appetite "skyrocketing."

articles.title: Spotify to adopt Apple’s new video podcast tech, offering creators easier cross-platform distribution
articles.description: Spotify will let creators distribute and monetize video podcasts on Apple Podcasts using Apple’s HLS streaming technology, without changing their existing workflows.

articles.title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
articles.description: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

articles.title: Kraken to replace LayerZero with Chainlink to bridge assets across blockchains
articles.description: The decision sees a total of over $3 billion in total value locked migrating after a $292 million LayerZero-powered bridge exploit involving Kelp.

articles.title: How to turn off Instagram’s new Instants feature and retract photos you accidentally shared
articles.description: While the Meta-owned social network billed Instants as a new format to share real-life moments as they’re happening, many users are looking for a way  to turn off the feature, especially those who have accidentally sent images to others, not fully understanding how the feature works.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Stablecoins: finance's new rails
articles.description: Stablecoins are moving beyond crypto into real-world finance, becoming vital B2B cross-border payment and treasury infrastructure, valued for efficiency, speed and regulatory compliance.

articles.title: Tether-backed Oobit expands crypto payments platform into Colombia
articles.description: The crypto payments company said users in Latin America are spending digital assets on groceries, restaurants and other everyday purchases.
